_comment: Clockcheck allowlist for the 4-wide refactor. Describes intentional refactor effects so rtl_clockcheck.py does not flag them as unexplained divergence. See doc/4wide_refactor_checklist.md and doc/4wide_pivot_plan_2026-04-25.md.
_notes: iq2_count is in ignore_fields in case Stage 2 drops NUM_INT_IQS to 2; remove from ignore list if Stage 2 keeps 3 IQs (current default).
max_cycle_delta_by_seq=50 allows for normal microarchitectural variance per committed instruction; tighten if false-positive resolution is needed.

flush/replay/reason are in ignore_fields because with pipe_width 6->4, the exact cycle of flush/replay events changes as a direct consequence of different pipeline timing. Functional correctness is verified by the regression tests (Task 1.7). These fields cannot be cycle-aligned across a width change.
free is in ignore_fields because INT_PRF_DEPTH changed 256->160, so the free-list count is 128 vs 224 at all times. This is an expected and intended Stage 1 parameter change.

iq0/iq1/iq2 are in ignore_fields because dispatch distributes instructions across IQs differently with 4-wide vs 6-wide PIPE_WIDTH. The per-cycle IQ occupancy diverges naturally; correctness is verified by regression (Task 1.7).
lq/sq are in ignore_fields because LQ/SQ fill rates diverge with a narrower dispatch width. Functional LSU behavior is verified by regression.
ckpt is in ignore_fields because checkpoint allocation depends on how many branches are dispatched per cycle, which changes with PIPE_WIDTH 6->4.
